{% if !has_clusters %}
No clusters formed in the lookback window. Either every record is an isolated outlier (try lowering the anomaly threshold), or the corpus is too small (k clamps to n − 1).

cluster #{{ c.id }} size {{ c.size }} rep density {{ "{:.3}"|format(c.rep_density) }} rep idx {{ c.rep_idx }}

{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
